programme.desc: After finding an American coin at Le Chameau's wreck site, Jeff MacKinnon must choose to either-stay the course or chase a new mystery.

programme.title: Hot As Hell

programme.title: Bear Down
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: Brick By Brick
programme.desc: In the swamp, the team uncovers a previously unknown structure remarkably resembling a container. And after weeks of chasing the elusive Chappell Vault, the Fellowship hits a void deep in the Money Pit.

programme.title: Black Sites
programme.desc: What lies beneath? David Duchovny takes us into the top-secret government bases and the clandestine operations they were built to conceal. Discover a deadly poison lab, a nuclear missile site and more.

programme.title: King Of The Mountain
programme.desc: On his 80th birthday Tom builds a teepee, while Nancy plans him a surprise party. Jake runs a mountain lion off the highway during calving season. Paul hauls his trapping shed up a narrow mountain.

programme.title: Cars
programme.desc: Join us as we take a look at a world of different luxuries each week. In this episode we get to peek inside the world's most luxurious cars.

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: 总编辑时间 (30/4/26)

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TAK ADA ROTAN RINDU MENJADI
programme.desc: Ridwan (Rendy Kjaernett) refuses to join his mother’s rattan business, choosing to work elsewhere. After a fierce argument with a naive village girl named Sumi (Faye Nicole Jones) at a bus terminal, fate intervenes when Sumi saves Ridwan’s mother. Impressed, his mother hires Sumi, forcing a reluctant Ridwan to work alongside the girl he once called a thief.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Gak Pengen Jadi Ipar Pengennya Jadi Pacar
programme.desc: Wini (Indah Nicole) accidentally crashes her bike into Dito (Hardi Fadhillah), causing an 'injury' to his sensitive area. Feeling responsible for his future, Wini tries to match her sister with Dito. However, she soon realizes her own heart objects, she is secretly falling for the man she’s trying to marry off.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but suddenly her best friend faints because she doesn't want Ara to marry her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). In the end, because she loves her best friend, Ara runs away to Sam's (Fauzan Nasrul) car. Ara is the daughter of a poor widow who works as a maid. She tries to steal her best friend's boyfriend, who is also the son of her mother's employer, using all sorts of funny methods, and eventually tries to reunite them.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Neng Ayam Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Nyaman
programme.desc: After his acting contract is terminated due to a scandal with a co-star, Fadi (Indra Evans) retreats to his mother’s village for a break. There, he meets Naura (Rachquel Nesia), a legendary 'poultry queen' who runs the most successful chicken and egg business in town.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Dua Hati Sarangheyo To SarangBeo
programme.desc: Keni (Fendy Chow) is forced into an unusual disguise: he must pose as a Korean Idol to save a 'Meet and Greet' event organized by Erika. Reluctantly, Keni steps into the spotlight, leading to a series of comedic and high-pressure situations.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Tergila Gila Sama Kamu Core
programme.desc: Rizki (Elryan Carlen) loses his memory and is rescued by Silvi (Larasati Nugroho). Silvi’s brother convinces her to marry Rizki, renaming him 'Dul.' When Rizki’s brother, Beno, finally finds him working as a humble farmer, another accident restores Rizki’s memory-leading him to realize he truly wants to marry Silvi after all.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Supir dan Majikan Adalah Maut

programme.title: REBUTAN HATI MISS UNI CORN
programme.desc: NETTY and SARA are two best friends who have been together since childhood. They do everything together. They have the same taste in everything, from matching clothes to being mistaken for sisters. Netty's mother also considers Sara as her own child, especially since Sara is an orphan who lives with her elderly uncle. Sara's uncle owns a corn farm that supplies corn for grilling at the peak. Meanwhile, Netty's mother runs an Indomie noodle stall, where Netty also works.

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but suddenly her best friend faints because she doesn't want Ara to marry her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). In the end, because she loves her best friend, Ara runs away to Sam's (Fauzan Nasrul) car. Ara is the daughter of a poor widow who works as a maid. She tries to steal her best friend's boyfriend, who is also the son of her mother's employer, using all sorts of funny methods, and eventually tries to reunite them.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Senyuman Penyeimbang Tatanan Dunia
programme.desc: Kinan (Indah Nicole), a doctor who moved to a village to escape her stepfamily, is pickpocketed at the market. The thief hands the loot to Arman (Kevin Hillers), causing a massive fight between Kinan and Arman. They meet again when Kinan saves Arman’s younger sibling, forcing them to see each other in a new light.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Maling Hati Malah Kena Ulti
programme.desc: Fafa (Djihan Ranti) is rude to a driver named Trisno (Ridho Illahi) after an accident. She later discovers Trisno is the man who tends to her mother’s goats. Fafa flatly rejects an arranged marriage with him, insulting him for his 'goat-like' scent, leaving the hardworking Trisno heartbroken.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.desc: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim tells the fate of the House of Helm Hammerhand, the legendary King of Rohan.

programme.title: Chocolat

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: A series of spectacular evil crimes has risen and former super-villain Gru has been recruited to find out who is responsible for them.

programme.title: Jurassic Park Iii

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Belum Mantan Masih Demen
programme.desc: Feeling abandoned by Sigit (Kiki Farrel) after seeing him post videos with a beautiful girl, Maya (Shanice Margaretha) decides enough is enough. She embarks on a mission to completely transform her appearance and behavior, determined to become the kind of woman who can capture the heart of any handsome man.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Cinta Kadang Gulali Ke Bawah Kadang Gulali Keatas
programme.desc: Ruby (Shanice Margaretha) has to replace her mother, who sells cotton candy in front of the school. While serving a girl, Ruby is accused by Angkasa (Fero Walandouw) of being part of a child abduction syndicate. Ruby refuses to accept such accusations and defends herself.

programme.title: INDONESIA FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a grand talk show featuring 'King Sultan' Andre Taulany and 'Prince' Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a hilarious squad of royal guards. With spectacular guest stars and non-stop entertainment, this is one regal spectacle you definitely don't want to miss!

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: JUARA INDONESIA RAMADHAN
programme.desc: "Juara Indonesia Ramadan" is a quiz show testing knowledge and agility in answering questions quickly and accurately.

programme.title: Emangnya Boleh Vibes Cintanya Sepura Pura Ini?
programme.desc: Retta (Anjani Dina) has an accident and falls into the swimming pool and drowns. Rio (Hardi Fadhillah) who saw this immediately helped Retta. Rio also managed to save Retta's life. Retta's mother (Miranty Dewi), who found out about this, immediately arranged for Rio and Retta to get married.

programme.title: Antara Aku, Kamu, Dan Lutung Kasarung
programme.desc: Mr. Reksa, a plantation owner, left his fortune to his kind-hearted daughter, Lily, through a will. Lily's arrogant and jealous siblings tried to seize the fortune by various means, including hiring thugs and even attempting to kill Lily. However, Lily managed to establish a good relationship with Lutung Kasarung and Keenan, a young man who had previously helped her, bringing change to all their lives.

programme.title: INDONESIA FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Hot Tea Hot Tea Kalau Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Desperate for a solution, Zulfa and Kevin turn to a matchmaking agency, only to be betrayed by their respective partners. Since they both need a significant other to complete a mission, the agency suggests they team up and fake a relationship. However, the game changes when Kevin meets Zulfa’s mother, who happens to be a close friend of his own parents. Now, their mothers are joining forces to force them into a real marriage.

programme.title: Trio Baperan Kena Polusi Cinta
programme.desc: Three young men named Malik, Jajang, and Jarwo are hired to work at a company owned by a beautiful woman named Dina. All three seem to be smitten with their boss's charm. However, Malik, who is known as a playboy, secretly hurts Dina's younger sister, Monic. Dina, as the older sister, does not remain silent. She secretly takes revenge by making the three men fall in love with her and then ignoring their love.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6

programme.title: Jinxed
programme.desc: Robin ignores the rules for a game of jinx and ends up losing his voice.

programme.title: A Sleepless Night/The Super Hero Catches A Cold
programme.desc: The pistol on a flower in the mountains is the Bobobobobone. Deca and Shiro must wake up all night as it only blossoms for a second.

programme.title: Princess Buttercup/Horn, Sweet Horn/The Stayover/The Wrinklegruff Gals/Strong Armed
programme.desc: Buttercup starts spending a lot of time with her new friends a group of bad-girl skaters called The Derbytant.

programme.title: A Dog Gone Day
programme.desc: A dog swap jeopardizes the royal mission and Sam’s date.

programme.title: Dancing Bean/Bean Shopping
programme.desc: Mr Bean enters a local dance competition.

programme.title: Bonehead
programme.desc: A dog uncovers trouble when he buries a bone in Bugs Bunny's hole.

programme.title: The Gut/The Wrinkle
programme.desc: Anais’s project clones Richard’s gut, testing her loyalty.

programme.title: In The Beginning

programme.desc: It's the first day back at school, but Gumball and Darwin are nowhere to be seen.

programme.title: Say Cheese!/Tale Of Two Teddies/Climbing Bean/Proposal Problem/Precious Plant
programme.desc: Mr Bean tricks Irma for a photo contest prize.

programme.title: The Titans Go Casual
programme.desc: The Titans introduce a new dress code called Casual Tuesday.

programme.title: The Memorino Virus
programme.desc: While capturing a sick robot, MechaBot becomes infected with the Memorino Virus, causing him to lose his memories.

programme.title: Public Radio/Big Trouble In Little Aberdale
programme.desc: Clarence is inspired to record a radio interview of his own.

programme.title: The Diet/The Ex/The Weirdo/The Menu/The Uncle
programme.desc: The kids' attempt to convince Richard to diet goes a little too well.

programme.title: Extreme Dominos
programme.desc: The Lemmings set up a long line of dominos.

programme.title: Ghost Spotters/Necklace Thief

programme.desc: The gang arrives in Atlantis hoping that Mr. Mollusk…

programme.desc: While Finn and Jake go swimming, Finn's hat magically comes to life!

programme.title: Steven's Dream/Adventures In Light Distortion/Gem Heist
programme.desc: A strange dream prompts Steven to search for answers.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Super villain Megamind's (Will Ferrell) dreams have come true when he conquers Metro Man (Brad Pitt) but when a new villain (Jonah Hill) runs rampant, can Megamind save the day?

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: Two of the warped writers of Scary Movie now set their parodic sights on the largest genre of them all: Hollywood's big-budget, special effects-laden, blockbuster franchise films.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Julia Roberts and Hugh Grant star in this delightful romantic comedy about a world-famous movie star who falls in love with a bookstore owner while the whole world watches.

programme.title: Creature From The Black Lagoon
programme.desc: In one of the most beloved sci-fi horror classics ever, a mysterious amphibious monster escapes captivity in order to be with a scientist's beautiful female lab assistant.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines (1985)
programme.desc: Fortune hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a resourceful woman to help her find her missing father lost in the wilds of 1900s Africa while being pursued by hostile tribes and a rival German explorer.

programme.title: The Specialist
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Sharon Stone star in this hard-edged thriller about an ex-CIA explosives expert (Stallone) who helps a seductive beauty (Stone) avenge the murder of her parents by a powerful Cuban-American crime boss.

programme.title: She-Devil
programme.desc: Ruth Patchett, an unattractive housewife, learns that her husband is having an affair and sets out to exact revenge on his mistress, a glamorous novelist.

programme.title: That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Why Frog Croaks
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Frog didn't croak. Frog sang like a bird… and the birds didn't like it. Birds were the masters of song and that's the way it should be! So the birds trick poor old Frog into a singing duel and sing and sing and sing… until poor old Frog's voice is reduced to a rebbit. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Spider Has A Tiny Waist
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Spider didn't have a tiny waist. She was all big and round… and did she like her food! One day greedy Spider hears of Four Feasts in Tinga Tinga and she wanted to go to them all! So she spun four threads and attached them to various animals going to the feasts. But the Monkeys, Frog, Hippo and the Bees all set off in different directions - North, South, East and West - and Spider's thread soon runs out.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Clippy Claws
programme.desc: Pat has a very special delivery today! Micawber's claws need clipping and Pat needs to deliver not only the claw clippers but Amy the vet too! On the way to the lighthouse though they encounter all sorts of animals needing help today - from a poorly Bonnie with a cold to a fretful Pumpkin who doesn't want to take his horse pills!

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Sorting Machine
programme.desc: Pat and Jess are called to Cardiff to collect a new sorting machine when the Pencaster machine breaks down.

programme.title: Mum's The Word
programme.desc: Christine (Big Chris' mum) is visiting Silver hatch. As is Mamma Mia… serious competition ensues!

programme.title: How The Hatch Was Won
programme.desc: Tin Top is feeling homesick so Big Chris tries to cheer him up. But who could that pesky varmint causing trouble on the track be?!

programme.title: Go Gadget James And Maxi
programme.desc: Maxi is jealous of all of James' gadgets, or more precisely, the attention the other cars give him. He persuades Molecom to devise some gadgets for him… with hilarious results

programme.title: Mr Carburettor Or Bust
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has commissioned a bust of himself for Silver Hatch. Disaster strikes when it is dropped, Big Chris tries to make amends, while Marsha distracts Mr Carburettor and the reporter

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Players
programme.desc: It's time for the Toyland football match but the game can't go ahead until Noddy finds the missing players. Noddy discovers that someone misdirected Pat Pat and Deltoid so that they'd miss the match. Noddy finds the missing players and reunites everyone at the real football pitch but then Hoof disappears. Noddy discovers that Hoof misdirected the others because he wanted to be the best player.

programme.title: The Case Of The Changed Basketball Hoop
programme.desc: Noddy's about to play a game of basketball with Big Ears and Deltoid when he realizes that the hoop has been fiddled with. Who could've done that and why? Noddy's investigation leads him to Fuse, who explains that he just wanted to help the toys that weren't as skilled as him. Everyone practises and realises that the best way to improve at sport is to keep practising. Well done Noddy.

programme.title: The Case Of The Ruined Crops
programme.desc: Farmer Tom is confused and upset when he finds all his trees and corn knocked over. Noddy decides to investigate: who spoiled Farmer Tom's crops? He soon discovers lots of strange heavy bags scattered all over the farm. Whose are they? Where did they come from? And what could they possibly have to do with Smartysaurus's new hot air balloon?

programme.title: The Case Of The Broken Pulley
programme.desc: The Head Builder isn't happy. Someone's been playing with the builders' stuff and now their pulley doesn't work. Noddy decides he needs to find out who did it before anything else goes wrong. Who broke the Builders' pulley?

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: Delivery Disaster / Slippery Business
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Escape The Backpack / Play Date
programme.desc: While helping Lola pack for her first day of camp, the Dews get stuck inside her backpack! Using the random items inside, the Dews get crafty in their attempt to break out. / When Eden and Phoebe join Harper and Marcus for a playdate, the Dews disagree on what activity their kids should do, ultimately learning that there are lots of ways to play!

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Players
programme.desc: It's time for the Toyland football match but the game can't go ahead until Noddy finds the missing players. Noddy discovers that someone misdirected Pat Pat and Deltoid so that they'd miss the match. Noddy finds the missing players and reunites everyone at the real football pitch but then Hoof disappears. Noddy discovers that Hoof misdirected the others because he wanted to be the best player.

programme.title: The Case Of The Changed Basketball Hoop
programme.desc: Noddy's about to play a game of basketball with Big Ears and Deltoid when he realizes that the hoop has been fiddled with. Who could've done that and why? Noddy's investigation leads him to Fuse, who explains that he just wanted to help the toys that weren't as skilled as him. Everyone practises and realises that the best way to improve at sport is to keep practising. Well done Noddy.

programme.title: The Case Of The Ruined Crops
programme.desc: Farmer Tom is confused and upset when he finds all his trees and corn knocked over. Noddy decides to investigate: who spoiled Farmer Tom's crops? He soon discovers lots of strange heavy bags scattered all over the farm. Whose are they? Where did they come from? And what could they possibly have to do with Smartysaurus's new hot air balloon?

programme.title: The Case Of The Broken Pulley
programme.desc: The Head Builder isn't happy. Someone's been playing with the builders' stuff and now their pulley doesn't work. Noddy decides he needs to find out who did it before anything else goes wrong. Who broke the Builders' pulley?

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Message in a Bubble / Glitteretti
programme.desc: Kelp has a new trick with his bubbles: he can have his friends put voice messages inside that you hear when you pop them. But when Pixie decides she doesn’t want the others to hear what’s in her bubble, the chase is on to rescue it! / Juniper is devastated when the traditional ceremony to celebrate her next level of spark achievement can’t happen. Kelp helps introduce a new tradition.

programme.title: Talent Show / Sad Sad Plant
programme.desc: Kelp writes a song about him and Scallop to perform at the unicorn show. But when it comes time, Scallop wants to keep the song "just for them", leaving Kelp to come up with anew act- and fast! / The kids all visit the magical musical plant greenhouse on Unicorn Land. They each pick a plant to take care of, and for Kelp it’s a sad, almost dead plant that he falls in love with.

programme.title: Mom for a Day / Kitty in the City
programme.desc: When Mom is sick on a busy day at home, Tag offers to pick up the slack and take on her tasks for the day. Tag handles it at first, but when the responsibilities start to stack up, she realizes that being Mom is much harder than she thought. \ Tag and Scooch are excited to get to know Kit, who has organized a bunch of cat-ivities for the day. But when Kit realizes she accidentally scratched up Frank and Beans’s tree, she, Tag and Scooch find a way to make it up to them.

programme.title: The Itch To Switch / Mismatched Socks
programme.desc: When Tag is frustrated living in a crowded house, and Scooch is bored in a quiet house, the two friends switch houses for the day. At first they both love their new lives. But as Scooch gets overwhelmed by all the activity at The Barker house, and Tag gets bored by the quiet life at the Pooch’s, they eagerly switch back before the day is done. \ When the Pawston Get Sox go on a losing streak, Tag and Scooch come up with the idea to have a team mascot.

programme.title: New Tail
programme.desc: D-Structs loses his wrecking ball tail and wants to prove he's still dangerous, but when he gets stuck the crew must decide if they will save him.

programme.title: Lucky and La Voltereta Feroz
programme.desc: While Lucky and Spirit struggle to find their place In the circus, Pru and Abigail set out across the frontier to track down their runaway friend

programme.title: Zero Dunk Thunky / Pie Vs Pie
programme.desc: Thunk is captured by the Broods and develops feelings for Blurg /At the Valley's food competition, Thunk and Ugga mistakenly make a new hit food

programme.title: Super Smash Siblings / A Hole In Grug
programme.desc: Eep and Thunk compete against their classmates in "Ahhh-Smashin"/After being denied a spot on the Valley's Wall of Fame, Grug creates a new game

programme.title: Quake, Rattle And Roll
programme.desc: Fishlegs and Meatlug liberate the Gronckles from a menacing dragon that has encroached on their ancestral home, Dark Deep.

programme.title: Have Dragon Will Travel Pt 1
programme.desc: The Dragon Riders are surprised to discover who is behind recent attacks on nearby ships - and to learn exactly what the ships are.

programme.title: One Last Job
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: Doom and Groom
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Cupcake Tree
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: The Fairy Festival!
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: Tim and Boss Baby want to bond with Dad by recreating a perfect "Dudes Weekend' camping trip, culminating in a photo opp, but everything seems to go wrong

programme.title: Play It Again, Tim
programme.desc: When Tim is forced to take piano lessons, he actually enjoys them and Boss Baby realizes that Tim is being brainwashed by his piano teacher, slowly turning Tim into an old man

programme.title: Research & Developments
programme.desc: Turtleneck wants to crack the Stinkless Serum formula and makes it a competition, pitting worker babies against worker babies, stating that the first one to the Serum will be the new CEO!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Taxing Trauma of the Treacherous Tattle Trials Part I
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Taxing Trauma of the Treacherous Tattle Trials Part II
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Worrisome Wedge of the Water Warmongers
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: The Dead End
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or "The Dead End," in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom.

programme.title: The Empty Well
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal - who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Shell Shocked Part 2
programme.desc: An extremely powerful new dragon attacks Dragon's Edge, and Hiccup makes a dangerous alliance while the fate of the Dragon Eye hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Enemy Of My Enemy
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: Crash Course
programme.desc: When a dangerous subterranean Cavern Crasher dragon invades the Fireworm Queen's underground nest, she approaches the Riders on Dragon's Edge for help.

programme.title: The Eternal Knight Pt. 2
programme.desc: To end the Eternal Night, Jim and the Trollhuntersmust risk everything in their battle against Gunmar.

programme.title: Escape From The Darklands
programme.desc: Toby, Claire, and Blinky work to keep the human world unaware of Jim’s absence as they look for ways to rescue him from the Darklands

programme.title: Skullcrusher
programme.desc: When Jim is imprisoned in the Darklands, Blinky tries to decipher the Amulet to save him while Claire, Toby, and NotEnrique race to recover the Killahead Bridge before it's too late

programme.title: A Thread In The Dark
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Slow Boat to England
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Slovakia and Hungary
programme.desc: Joanna discovers that the "blue Danube" is both a constant reminder of Europe's unchanging beauty, its past triumphs and current threats - and the thread that keeps it powerfully connected.

programme.title: Bottlenose Dolphins
programme.desc: It is time for a competitive BioBlitz as the team splits into two to see which can find the most species against the clock.

programme.title: Bull Sharks
programme.desc: Steve wants to introduce the team to the bull shark.

programme.title: Monkeys
programme.desc: While in Costa Rica, Patrick investigates the declining population of insects and heads deep into the rainforest to find out just how far and wide this dramatic change is being felt.

programme.title: Tanzania - Mount Kilimanjaro
programme.desc: Many call it the 'Roof of Africa'. Mount Kilimanjaro is often considered the easiest of the big Seven. But with a 50% success rate, this journey to the summit is not as easy as it looks.

programme.title: Slovakia and Hungary
programme.desc: Joanna discovers that the "blue Danube" is both a constant reminder of Europe's unchanging beauty, its past triumphs and current threats - and the thread that keeps it powerfully connected.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover how succulent stuffed olives get from branch to jar; how 12,000 plates of tasty tortellini are made per day; how locally-sourced ingredients make the best cranberry pumpkin-seed baguettini.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover how traditional methods still factor into modern-day croissant production; why shredding is key to make delicious rhubarb strawberry jam; how a spice tumbler produces the best tasting stuffing.

programme.title: Monkeys
programme.desc: While in Costa Rica, Patrick investigates the declining population of insects and heads deep into the rainforest to find out just how far and wide this dramatic change is being felt.

programme.desc: Joanna discovers that the "blue Danube" is both a constant reminder of Europe's unchanging beauty, its past triumphs and current threats - and the thread that keeps it powerfully connected.

programme.title: Lincolnshire
programme.desc: Ben heads to northern England and stays with host Paul in Lincolnshire onboard his 30-year-old converted military truck. He discovers why Paul traded living in a house for life on the road.

programme.title: Cities
programme.desc: Cities are the fastest growing habitat on Earth, but life in the man-made world is not easy for animals. Will the future see cities designed for wildlife too?

programme.title: Monkeys

programme.desc: Discover how succulent stuffed olives get from branch to jar; how 12,000 plates of tasty tortellini are made per day; how locally-sourced ingredients make the best cranberry pumpkin-seed baguettini.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover how traditional methods still factor into modern-day croissant production; why shredding is key to make delicious rhubarb strawberry jam; how a spice tumbler produces the best tasting stuffing.

programme.title: Monkeys
programme.desc: While in Costa Rica, Patrick investigates the declining population of insects and heads deep into the rainforest to find out just how far and wide this dramatic change is being felt.

programme.title: Lincolnshire
programme.desc: Ben heads to northern England and stays with host Paul in Lincolnshire onboard his 30-year-old converted military truck. He discovers why Paul traded living in a house for life on the road.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover how great bagels get even better with some wild blueberry cream cheese filling; how an x-ray machine helps to make delicious pot roast; how refreshing spring water from 186 ft down gets into your glass.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover how the sandwich staple Wonderbread is made; how nutty pecans are transformed into sugary rich pralines; how to make a perfectly balanced Morroccan harira vegan soup; and how stainless steel plates ensure the most crystal clear bagged ice!

programme.title: Mountains
programme.desc: In northern Guangdong, majestic mountain ranges are home to a dazzling array of wildlife; Silver Pheasants, Chinese Pangolins, Black Kites, Chinese Giant Salamanders, and an entirely new species of cave gecko.

programme.title: Cyril Chauquet Wild Catch (S1)
programme.desc: After fighting a ragged-tooth shark, Cyril's boat is attacked by a bull shark.

programme.title: Last Humans Standing
programme.desc: Shocking new insights into the demise of modern humans' sister species, the Neanderthals, Homo sapiens's possible role in their downfall and how it became the last human species on Earth.

programme.title: 新闻夜视界
programme.desc: 收看TVBS News，掌握实时新闻动态

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】医疗事故越闹越大，副院长英杰更有利益输送之嫌。方欣为了让英杰在董事会投她一票于背后操控事件；一妍看准以珈的正义感，放消息让以珈介入医疗事故。以珈得知海淳到了首尔，立即飞抵当地，成功救了遇险的海淳。以珈与受了伤的海淳回港，以珈对前来探望的一妍大兴问罪……

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜帮助冷天曦缓解月噬之苦，得到彧修明的赏赐。在准备解开南宫封印的过程中，叶凌霜被彧修明发现，却意外召唤出一条绿龙。在搏斗过程中，彧修明展现出伤口快速愈合的能力。最后，他们成功让绿龙躲回水中。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 家朗收到神秘电邮，内容疑似与振强的黑材料有关，家朗心中对振强起疑。满月找柏中帮忙跟踪振强，柏中想趁机夺取振强的犯罪证据，却失败而回。与此同时，满月惊闻曦晨失踪，担心是对振强展开复仇行动被发现而引来麻烦……家朗收到振强收受利益的证据，暗中调查振强，竟揭破振强过去的恶行。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】建邦告知启澄，传染病事件是永成搞鬼。明塱众多医生被强制隔离，手术被延误，顿时陷入混乱！一妍分身于各手术室，尽力拯救病人。方欣往找永成，提出条件要求他收手……永成的重要客户林鍈伟是泰国有势力人士，其父亲患肝病急需换肝，永成别有用心，给鍈伟提出方法。海淳要求以珈接手一宗医疗诉讼，为在分娩时遇上隔离事件、导致状况垂危的何太，控告明塱！

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明与叶凌霜共同经历绿龙事件后，关系变得更加微妙。在圣寿节这天，叶凌霜拉彧修明出宫看花灯，两人的关系得到进一步升温。另一方面，彧修明任命界诸婴为越州大都护，引发樊如晦和左近天的不满，左近天甚至派兵埋伏，意图杀死界诸婴。面对困境，界诸婴决定通过不受左近天控制的夜沼前往越州。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 基俊被董博利诱，想透过宝鐷建设的工程生意，暗中与「第一钢材」达成台底交易。慧云遭基俊冷落，终日赌钱来排解苦闷，一次因无法偿还赌债而把限量版手袋作抵押。陈幸芳要求媳妇慧云带同该手袋出席时装秀，慧云只能以高仿品充当真品，却惹假货疑云；满月使计替慧云解围，取得其信任。

programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶和界诸婴为了躲避左近天的追杀，选择带领族人穿越危险的夜沼前往越州。在途中，他们遇到了困难，但最终通过与土伯的交易成功穿越。然而，到达营地时发现夜北族人被左近天抓走，七海伶和界诸婴为救族人分别被擒。另一方面，叶凌霜因与翼无忧私下见面被樊如晦设计陷害，被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】医疗事故越闹越大，副院长英杰更有利益输送之嫌。方欣为了让英杰在董事会投她一票于背后操控事件；一妍看准以珈的正义感，放消息让以珈介入医疗事故。以珈得知海淳到了首尔，立即飞抵当地，成功救了遇险的海淳。以珈与受了伤的海淳回港，以珈对前来探望的一妍大兴问罪……

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 家朗收到神秘电邮，内容疑似与振强的黑材料有关，家朗心中对振强起疑。满月找柏中帮忙跟踪振强，柏中想趁机夺取振强的犯罪证据，却失败而回。与此同时，满月惊闻曦晨失踪，担心是对振强展开复仇行动被发现而引来麻烦……家朗收到振强收受利益的证据，暗中调查振强，竟揭破振强过去的恶行。

programme.title: 新不了情
programme.desc: 歌女青青与建筑师汤鹏南原是一对感情深厚的情侣，可惜好景不常，汤家突遭巨变，青青不惜出卖自己肉体以相助鹏南，想不到竟被鹏南误会而导致俩人分手。后来鹏南得知事情始末，欲挽回感情，可惜青青已患上绝症。

programme.title: 鱼美人
programme.desc: 张珍与金宠之女牡丹早有婚约，金宠却欲退婚。张珍偶遇化身金牡丹样子的鲤鱼精，两人渐生情愫。一天，金宠请包公来公断两个真假牡丹，包公为成全二人，推辞此案...

programme.title: 残缺
programme.desc: 庄主杜天道其子被人斩去双臂，性格变得暴戾。无故地先后打伤四人致残。四人成残缺一族，走投无路，入深山找师父授以武功，立志报仇...

programme.title: 青春恋
programme.desc: 酷爱音乐的留学生李英伟临危受命替老父接管公司，其嬉皮士形像为祖母不屑。李的公司职员林仲鹏乘机制造事端，图谋夺取其总经理之职位。李之青梅竹马朋友王凤不忍见李受屈，化身金发美人巧施妙计助他解困，自此李对此神秘女郎一见钟情 。

programme.title: 南少林与北少林
programme.desc: 满清入主中原后，北少林为免遭剿灭，只好受命派出弟子到清军府担任教头，谁知抵达后，始知府中已有南少林教头；期间将军挑动两派人不和继而公开比武互相残杀，后南派因弟子伤亡而与北派交恶，展开一番互相残杀...

programme.title: 三笑
programme.desc: 风流才子唐伯虎邂逅了丫鬟秋香，被她所吸引，遂决定隐瞒身份，进入华家作书僮，藉此接近秋香，并向她表明自己的身份和来意，可惜秋香并不相信。最后，唐伯虎凭藉其出众的个人才智及好友的协助下，终于抱得美人归。

programme.title: 杂技亡命队
programme.desc: 故事描述，土匪出身的军人韩佩昌发动叛变，杀死师长杨宗，窃居其位，杨家只得长子大英一人逃出生天。大英志切报仇，结果未得手已告命丧；其好友陈风、梁国仁、傅全义、辛成决替其复仇...

programme.title: 花街时代
programme.desc: 少女美丽为谋生来到湾仔酒吧当吧女，自此沦落风尘。其后，美丽在酒吧认识占美，深深爱上他，并确定自己已找到真爱。当占美要离开的时候，伤心的美丽即陷入低潮，直到遇上黑帮头目王英才有了倚靠。

programme.title: 八万罪人
programme.desc: 香港在1953至1955年，曾被警方称为最黑暗的时期，那时候罪恶泛滥，百弊丛生，一日可发生三十二宗惊人案件，而犯罪份子有百分之四十是积犯；英廷特派专员来港调查监狱的措施，发现狱中不良份子，滥用权力，公报私仇，歪曲政府的监狱制度，造成犯人越变越黑，监狱变成地狱。影片主角江才因不甘受探长侮辱，结果被控妨碍公务，判刑一年零八个月...

programme.title: 山歌恋
programme.desc: 牧羊女古秀秀喜唱山歌，父亲嗜赌如命；青年刘大龙与秀对唱山歌，情愫互生。曾老虎以追债要胁古老头许婚；刘欲酬钱替秀父还债。怎知帆船归来而刘却失踪！秀无奈答允出嫁...

programme.title: 洪文定三破白莲教
programme.desc: 白莲教主六十余岁，红颜白发，练就绝招，能闭全身穴道，武功高深莫测，却甘作满清鹰犬，暗中协助师侄高进忠，消灭反清志士及破坏重建少林寺；洪文定为少林英雄洪熙官之子，曾击毙白之师弟白眉道人，名震江湖。白与高侦知洪住反清志士胡亚彪家中，夜袭杀胡及其妹，洪幸护着身怀六甲的胡妻突围逃走...

programme.title: 红楼梦
programme.desc: 这部电影改编自中国史上最广受欢迎的文学作品《红楼梦》，被誉为同名电影中最成功的作品。乐蒂生动地诠释了美丽却带有一丝哀愁的林黛玉角色，也因此赢得了「古典美人」的美誉。

programme.title: Day 5 Session 2 Tie 2: Indonesia vs France (C1)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Season 3 Episode 13
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: UCI Pro Series - Tour of Oman Stage 3 H/Ls
programme.desc: Relive the intensity from Stage 3 of the Tour of Oman where cyclists make their way from the Eastern Mountain to Samail.

programme.title: BCI Seguros Chile Open (250) Final
programme.desc: The Chile Open is a professional ATP Tour 250 men’s tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Santiago, Chile. As part of the prestigious "Golden Swing" of Latin American tournaments, it is a key event in the early season. It has roots back to 1930 and is played at the Club Deportivo Universidad Católica in Santiago.

programme.title: Open Capfinances Rouen Métropole (250) Final
programme.desc: The Open de Rouen is a professional women’s tennis tournament on the WTA Tour, established in 2022 and held at the Kindarena in Rouen, France. The tournament offers over $275,000 in total prize money and features top international talent.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open (1000) R16 Session 1
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier tournament held annually on clay courts at the Caja Mágica in Madrid, Spain. As one of three elite European clay-court Masters events, it features a 96-player singles draw and attracts top-tier talent.

programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier tournament held annually on clay courts at the Caja Mágica in Madrid, Spain. As one of three elite European clay-court Masters events, it features a 96-player singles draw and attracts top-tier talent.

programme.desc: Catch all the triumphant moments from the 13 winning teams who are through to the second round of qualifiers.

programme.title: BMW Open

programme.title: The World (2026)
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026)
programme.desc: James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, overnight developments, interviews and new details on the top stories this morning, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport and Lillian Rangiah with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026)
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Landline (2026)
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 披荆斩棘3
programme.desc: 本季节目以"奋进"为内核，不仅延续了前两季的全景竞演综艺模式，还通过赛制、环节等方面的升级再度强化节目的竞技性。嘉宾们不断挑战、探索，展现男性的奋斗精神和个性魅力。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 长相思第一季

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理 7
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 大胃王来了4
programme.desc: 讓人耳目一新的《大胃王來了4》開創台灣美食節目的新篇章！藉由大胃王們幸福地享用美食，讓人看了食慾大開！

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: Coming Home
programme.desc: The siblings touch down in Haines, Alaska, on a mission to find a new homestead for Noah. Meanwhile, Bam and Gabe face hungry predators coming out from hibernation.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Dredge
programme.desc: Summer temperatures at an all time high disrupt the seafloor, causing miners to find new strategies. Shawn fights a legal battle.

programme.title: Red Flag Warning
programme.desc: The loader fire forces a new reality, so Adrian revives an old fire truck as fallers fall big-money timber and road damage shuts down hauling.

programme.title: Gold Blooded
programme.desc: To test mother nature's stamina,Shawn pushes the Christine Rose to its maximum work depth in the face of massive swells while Ken digs on a gold-rich dirt patch.

programme.title: Belly Of The Beast
programme.desc: Isolated beneath the mountains of Romania, Joe and Cody fight to escape the pitch black darkness with dying headlamps.

programme.title: Raw Deal
programme.desc: Jared strikes a risky deal with a powerful businessman that will give him exclusive rights to the Forever Claim... if it doesn't bleed him dry first.

programme.title: Missouri Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple plan to build out their inherited property in Missouri. They face flooding and huge fires as they attempt to pull of this ambitious project.

programme.title: The Cowboy Challenge - Go West
programme.desc: Otto Karasch travels to the Wild West for an ambitious challenge: to participate in a cattle drive as a cowboy, undergoing a tough training session.

programme.title: Back In The Ring
programme.desc: As summer kicks into gear, Ken and the Myrtle Irene get stuck in the mud. The Kellys are forced to bail out at Fort Davis.

programme.title: Belly Of The Beast
programme.desc: Isolated beneath the mountains of Romania, Joe and Cody fight to escape the pitch black darkness with dying headlamps.

programme.title: Red Flag Warning
programme.desc: The loader fire forces a new reality, so Adrian revives an old fire truck as fallers fall big-money timber and road damage shuts down hauling.

programme.title: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A serial killer's descendant tells the truth about his death. Are the mafia and government co-conspirators? Did the last Romanov truly escape death?

programme.title: Behind The Myth
programme.desc: Was the exotic dancer Mata Hari a German spy? Two climbers vanish into legend atop Mount Everest. A ghost's testimony is used to convict a murderer.

programme.title: Its Not Life Or Death - Yet
programme.desc: Mickey fires one of the team's only experienced members before enlisting a local guide to lead them through a treacherous desert.

programme.title: Restricted Zone
programme.desc: Johnathan and Sig partner to hunt the elusive Bairdi hoard at the edge of the Restricted Zone.

programme.title: What Would Phil Harris Do?
programme.desc: With the Bairdi fishery open for the first time in years, Josh and John on the Time Bandit reopen the Phil Harris playbook.

programme.title: Tangled Web
programme.desc: Time Bandit and Cornelia Marie race for the last spot at the cannery.

programme.title: Fire Line
programme.desc: Chainsaws spark fires, and when a blaze hits the Forever Claim, Jared must make a call whether to end the season early.

programme.title: Energy Frontline: Japan
programme.desc: Power Shifters takes you to the front lines of Japan's energy overhaul, where the work is punishing, the stakes are sky high, and failure isn't an option.

programme.title: The Frozen North
programme.desc: The Frozen North, where wolves and polar bears vie for food, hares outsmart lynx, and walrus sing on rocky shores.

programme.title: Strange But True
programme.desc: Who was the child who inspired "The Exorcist"? A con artist leaves a path of deception and murder. Did hallucinogenic honey win an ancient battle?

programme.title: Im Gonna Die On This Mountain
programme.desc: A perilous bridge crossing exposes how far Mickey is willing to go for good film footage before the team heads deep into the Eastern Andes.

programme.title: Stone Lion Inn
programme.desc: The Ghost Adventures crew unravels the mystery behind a mortuary-turned-inn in Guthrie, Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Real Sharknado
programme.desc: We have all seen the movies, sharks jumping into boats, circling in tornados and risking their lives to attack humans.

programme.title: 开棺
programme.desc: 消失三年的鬼手及其盗墓团伙重现江城，再次下墓摸金。怎料四名盗墓贼在开棺时遇惊魂邪煞，逃离后又接连惨死家中。最终古墓尸毒和针孔成为留给员警沈春合仅有的线索，看似普通的盗墓案，瞬间扑朔迷离疑点重重。

programme.title: 青蛙王子
programme.desc: 此喜剧在夏威夷开始，富家子为人腼腆，追女乏术，好友充当其爱情顾问，带他四出泡妞，却碰得一鼻子灰，闹出连场笑话。

programme.title: 倒数回击
programme.desc: 天才拳击手徐佳阳为了替父亲还赌债在地下酒馆打黑拳时被举报，痛失奥运资格赛，陨落拳坛。十年后，铁血教练陈丽月决要助她实现父亲的遗愿，重回拳坛找回昔日的自己。当拳击的热血碰上责任时，曾经失落的拳击梦能否再度燃烧？

programme.title: 最佳女婿
programme.desc: 新潮发型屋少东 Happy 哥与死党赖布甸、龙眼仔, 因抢走上海理发店板大松客人, 与他发生口角. 一夜, 三人胡涂地与松女儿阿英醉宿一宵, 之后英意外怀孕, 不知是谁才是经手人, 惟有待孩子出世后, 以血型辨别亲父, 怎料三人皆属同一血型...

programme.title: 倾城之恋
programme.desc: 本片由香港导演许鞍华执导，改编自著名小说家张爱玲的同名小说，是一个发生在日军入侵香港期间的爱情故事。一个内向的上海离婚女子和一个愤世嫉俗的马来西亚花花公子互相倾慕。但因时局动荡，两人多次被迫分开，最终能否有情人终成眷属?

programme.title: 男与女
programme.desc: 偷渡客孟思晨匿居于山边木屋区，沦为众男工具，期间结识非法拳师江远生，并发生雾水情缘。后来思晨下嫁中年木匠贵叔，生活虽安稳，心灵却空虚。意外再遇远生后，难免干柴烈火，未几更有孕...

programme.title: 马永贞
programme.desc: 从山东逃难至上海的马永贞，因救了势力人士谭四而受到赏识，又从黑帮头子杨双手上夺取了他在上海的第一个地盘，从此平步青云。杨双与巡捕房勾结，谋害谭四并派人伏杀马永贞...

programme.title: 僵尸先生
programme.desc: 茅山师父九叔受委托为富翁起棺迁葬，祈求新墓地能催财。惟富翁之尸体出现尸变后，变成僵尸，并在村内四处为害。此时，九叔的两名徒弟亦分别被僵尸所伤和受女鬼迷惑。九叔如何同时面对徒弟们生死存亡，以及僵尸为害的问题呢？

programme.title: 窥情
programme.desc: 波子一夜用望远镜窥看家邻近四周时，揭发了一宗命案。但经警方调查村内居民，包括富商情妇Rita、邮差、纸店主老王及其妻子等人，揭开彼此间错综复杂的情欲关系之同时，还是不知谁是受害人，谁是凶手... 于是，波子决定用自己的方法继续调查...

programme.title: 冰封侠之时空行者
programme.desc: 《冰封侠：时空行者》承接前作，四位明朝锦衣卫在现代香港苏醒。为修正历史，贺英独自踏上了寻找「时空金球」的凶险旅程，却不知自己正一步步堕入精心布下的致命陷阱。

programme.title: 七小福
programme.desc: 本片是改编自京剧大师于占元师傅的真实故事。六十年代戏剧文化日渐衰落，但于师傅仍坚持要保留他的戏剧学院。三个少年决意入读于师傅的戏剧研究学院，向他拜师学艺，经过艰辛的训练过程后，于师傅终于成功造就香港影坛这三大巨星。

programme.title: 拳击小子
programme.desc: 以行船为生的前拳手提早退休，重回香港，遇上青年。青年因追求老板妹妹而与货运少东起冲突，并将少东打伤。他们约定三个月后双方擂台打拳以定强弱...

programme.title: 撞邪先生
programme.desc: 美容院职员曾小雨机缘巧合之下，认识了富豪之子利志，以为交上好运。岂料利志的父亲是茅山高人，在南洋大败一降头师时，被下咒绝子绝孙，让利志每次恋爱皆遭恶鬼破坏，无疾而终。小雨深爱利志，找大法师沈慈航帮助，授以五色驱邪带，两人顺利结婚。新婚之夜，利志遗失了驱邪彩带，果然恶鬼来犯...

programme.title: Pepper's Blanket Is Missing
programme.desc: Pepper's blanket goes missing at a cabin sleepover.

programme.desc: Oscar and Hedgehog learn how to stop time.

programme.desc: A storm blocks Oscar and Hedgehog's one chance to see a comet.

programme.title: Have Yourself A Joyful Little Animas
programme.desc: It's the hottest day of the year, meaning it's time for the annual multi-day animal holiday, ANIMAS.

programme.title: Making The Grade
programme.desc: Adam discovers that, rather than letter grades, CDMS gives out generic positive symbols like smiley faces and rainbows.

programme.title: One Lump Or Tutor
programme.desc: When Adam fails yet another 'Feeding Frenzy' exam, Mr. Hornbill hints that he'll be held back if he doesn't pass the next one.

programme.title: Pranks For The Memories
programme.desc: Jake thinks Adam is trying to usurp his title as CDMS' resident 'Prank Master General'.

programme.title: Hotel For Dogs
programme.desc: A teen secretly fills a vacant house with stray dogs after she moves in with her fastidious aunt and has to leave her dog behind.

programme.title: Except For Cooper
programme.desc: A young boy must learn to eat his spinach in order to save Uncle Grandpa and the others from a rowdy gang of evil vegetables.

programme.title: In The Clouds
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa helps a boy get his head out of the clouds and focussed on his history test.

programme.title: Belly Bros
programme.desc: When a kid is bummed that his favorite shirt won't fit over his big belly, it's up to Uncle Grandpa to show him that t-shirts come and go, but having a big belly is always cool.

programme.title: Funny Face
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa accidentally unleashes a floating Funny Face that's so funny you will laugh yourself to insanity! Can Gus' seriousness save them from the hilarity?

programme.title: Space Emperor
programme.desc: When Uncle Grandpa mistakes a kid in a costume for an evil space emperor, he sends him to another dimension!

programme.title: Monster Visit
programme.desc: The monsters get nervous when their Godmonster comes for a visit.

programme.desc: Pepper's blanket goes missing at a cabin sleepover.

programme.desc: Oscar and Hedgehog learn how to stop time.

programme.desc: A storm blocks Oscar and Hedgehog's one chance to see a comet.

programme.title: The Tao Of Macau
programme.desc: The day has come when the final four chefs must cook with the world's smelliest fruit durian. This infamous fruit is a delicacy in Macau, but will Padma and guest judge, James Beard Award winner Abe Conlon be able to stomach their creations for the season

programme.title: Carny Crazy
programme.desc: The carnival comes to CDMS and while Jake and his animal buddies enjoy everything it has to offer, Adam becomes totally obsessed with winning a cheesy 'Princess Ballerina Snow Globe'.

programme.title: Up And Adam
programme.desc: Adam is rewarded with the keys to the LOOKOUT TOWER, a swanky bachelor pad high atop the school.

programme.title: New School Scaries
programme.desc: Cookie Monster feels nervous about going to cooking school for the first time.

programme.title: Tee Ball Trouble
programme.desc: Papa Bear is excited to teach Baby Bear T-Ball, but Baby Bear would rather draw the ball than hit it.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: A sheltered chameleon with an identity crisis finds himself in a town plagued by bandits and must play the hero to protect it.

programme.title: Hotel For Dogs
programme.desc: A teen secretly fills a vacant house with stray dogs after she moves in with her fastidious aunt and has to leave her dog behind.

programme.title: Tiger Trails
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa just needs his trusty Giant Realistic Flying Tiger, but when he finds out she's gone, it sends Uncle Grandpa on a journey to find the tiger and figure out why she left.

programme.title: Moustache Cream

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 健康2.0

programme.title: Uber Cup QF 2 (C2)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: Day 13 Afternoon Session: SF 1
programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. Played annually over 17 days at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, England, since 1977, it is the pinnacle of the sport, concluding the season's Triple Crown Series.
